text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, machines can produce paintings that look like masterpieces, compose music in the style of famous composers, and even write poems or news articles. This is called AI-generated art, music, and writing. Some people worry that machines will replace human artists. However, human creativity comes from emotions, experiences, and imagination—things AI does not truly understand. Machines learn from existing data and copy patterns, while humans can create something completely new and meaningful. Instead of replacing us, AI can be a helpful tool, inspiring artists and writers to explore new ideas and push creative boundaries.
